hero.title: Audit log viewer
hero.body: Monitor user, agent, and system activity. Filter by event type, actor, resource, or date range.

timeline.title: Exchange lifecycle timeline
timeline.body: Complete audit trail for this exchange: every state transition and approval event in chronological order.
timeline.tableBody: Requested, reserved, submitted, retrieved, and approval decision events rendered in chronological order.
timeline.loadingBody: Fetching the exchange timeline and approval trail.
timeline.emptyBody: No exchange lifecycle events were found for this exchange.

filters.title: Search and scope
filters.body: Filter by event type, actor class, resource ID, or date range.
filters.resourceIdPlaceholder: Exchange ID, member ID, or approval ref

table.title: Workspace events
table.body: Click any row to inspect the sanitized metadata. Exchange rows include a drill-down into the full lifecycle timeline.
table.emptyBody: No audit events matched the current filters. Adjust the search scope or refresh after more workspace activity occurs.
table.sanitizedMetadataHint: Sensitive values remain masked at the API boundary.
table.footerHint: Masked JSON expansion is read-only for every workspace role.
